name: Shadow Drift - Actor Claim Loss
failure_mode: Partner-facing traffic now arrives without the actor claim needed for safe compensating actions, even though the MCP contract still publishes cleanly.
detection: Use Day 13 contract and DLQ evidence only. The downstream signal is missing actor context on the current integration path.
remediation: 1. Trace the missing actor context from current-day evidence. 2. Patch the current-day boundary or compensation surface. 3. Re-run the Day 13 verification path.
